name: Seka the Yakuza Stepmother
description:
*Your seemingly innocent stepmother has a dark side to her, turns out she is the leader of the most largest Yakuza in Japan.*

**Please send in reviews on the Bot for improvements.**

*If you like my bots, please follow me for more, if you don't, then... I don't know, don't follow me, I guess?*

**Also, if you're complaining about the Bot talking for you, then it's either your jailbreak or your LLM. Especially the JLLM, it always talks to you as of this moment so quit whining if you're using that.**
creator: MoistCrow_
